objectives: Review 15 source files in mx20022-runtime Rust workspace for code quality and maintainability
constraints: Keep changes minimal and auditable per CLAUDE.md
important_facts: mx20022-store-sqlite recently rewritten from rusqlite to sqlx with async pool + OnceCell
No unsafe code found across all reviewed files

Key issues: duplicate encode_time(), query() does in-process filtering, ensure_initialized() auto-migrates in production, hardcoded bearer-token check, mpsc queue depth magic number 1024, commit phase missing success ParticipantResult entries
decisions_made: Classified duplicate encode_time as HIGH (3 copies across service.rs, lib.rs, main.rs)
Classified auto-migration in ensure_initialized as CRITICAL for production deployments
Classified in-process query filtering as CRITICAL for scalability at payment volumes
Classified hardcoded 'readonly' token logic as CRITICAL security issue
risks_issues: Auto-migration in ensure_initialized bypasses deployment controls: OPEN
query() filters in Rust rather than SQL — will not scale: OPEN
Hardcoded bearer token value 'readonly' in authorization logic: OPEN
commit phase does not record successful ParticipantResult entries: OPEN
pool_size config field is parsed but never passed to SqlitePool: OPEN

iteration.summary: Performed full code review of 15 source files in the mx20022-runtime Rust workspace. No unsafe code was found. The core 2PC transaction manager, state machine, and context map are well-designed. The main concerns are: (1) ensure_initialized() silently auto-runs migrations on every cold start, which is dangerous in production; (2) the Store::query() implementation fetches all rows then filters in Rust, which will not scale; (3) authorization logic contains a hardcoded 'readonly' bearer token value duplicated across http.rs and host.rs; (4) encode_time() is copy-pasted into three separate files; (5) the mpsc channel depth of 1024 is a magic number with no documentation; (6) pool_size config is parsed but silently ignored. The codebase is otherwise clean with good error propagation and consistent idioms.
inputs_consulted: All 15 files listed in task description
next_actions: Move encode_time into a shared mx20022-time utility crate or module
Push SQL filtering into WHERE clauses in query()
Separate ensure_initialized from apply_migrations — do not auto-migrate in production
Replace hardcoded 'readonly' token check with proper RBAC or at minimum a configurable value
Document the 1024 mpsc bound or make it configurable via PipelineSection
Wire pool_size config to SqlitePool builder
